..annotation: Project root with build configuration, dependency management, and developer documentation.

src/todo_app.annotation: Main Python package containing application configuration and the FastAPI server entry point.

src/todo_app/api.annotation: FastAPI route definitions and authentication handlers for the REST API.

src/todo_app/db.annotation: SQLAlchemy database engine configuration and session management.

src/todo_app/models.annotation: Pydantic data models for request/response validation and serialization.

src/todo_app/services.annotation: Business logic layer for todo operations, separate from API routes.

tests.annotation: Pytest test suite with service layer tests and shared fixtures.
